reviews.review_description: It’s so hard to use the keys are either to loud to high pitch to low pitch and it’s so hard to use the keyboard don’t buy it

reviews.review_title: Worth it for the course alone
reviews.review_description: Very nice game. As a novice piano player, I found the lessons informative and simple. The instructor has a charming accent, and his passion for teaching the piano show through. I’m only on the first lesson, and have filled in many of the gaps, that my self-teaching method left. With good lighting, your own hands are responsive as controllers. The piano itself is a little too sensitive for me, but that may improve as I get better. Truly the value of this app, far surpasses the $5 cost.
